name: io.github.StemSplit/stemsplit-mcp
description: MCP server for AI stem separation — remove vocals, isolate instrumentals, build karaoke tracks, or split audio into vocals, drums, bass, piano, guitar, and other stems from local files, YouTube URLs, or SoundCloud tracks.

environmentVariables.name: STEMSPLIT_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your StemSplit API key — get one at https://stemsplit.io
